The appearance of ketoprofen impurity A CRS 7, a yellow viscous liquid to semi-solid was found to be different from the one of CRS 6, a yellowish crystalline powder. The difference in aspect do not affect the preparation of reference solution (b) as described in the Ph. Eur. monograph for ketoprofen (01/2017:0922) and this CRS was found to be suitable for its intended purpose.

Reference.Information: This Reference Standards must be used exclusively for essential laboratory and analytical uses. Outside EU: upon receipt of your order, EDQM will apply for an export permit (only valid 28 days).

Reference.Reference_Standard: TROPICAMIDE IMPURITY D CRS - * DRUG PRECURSOR (PHENYLACETIC ACID)
Reference.Information: EU: Please fill in and return the end-user declaration, template available https://go.edqm.eu/precursors. We also require a copy of your agreement. Outside EU: We require your original import permit to apply for an export licence from the French authorities (allow 6-8 weeks). For your import permit, you have to apply for 10 mg of Phenylacetic acid, PER VIAL. Your import permit must be valid for at least 3 months. Please specify your preferred airport for parcel pickup in your next communication.

Trypsin BRP batch 3 is suitable for use in monographs 0476 and 0694 but not suitable for use in monographs 0580 for Aprotinin and 0579 for Aprotinin concentrated solution. For use with monographs 0580 and 0579, please use Y0002311 Trypsin for aprotinin assay BRP

Reference.Reference_Standard: TYPHAE POLLEN DRY EXTRACT FOR SYSTEM SUITABILITY HRS
UNCARIA STEM WITH HOOKS DRY EXTRACT FOR SYSTEM SUITABILITY HRS
URSODEOXYCHOLIC ACID FOR SYSTEM SUITABILITY CRS
URSODOXICOLTAURINE FOR IMPURITY B IDENTIFICATION CRS
VALPROIC ACID FOR SYSTEM SUITABILITY CRS

Reference.Information: Cell lines (kidney, African Green Monkey, Cercopithecus Aethiops) for the titration of live measles, mumps and rubella vaccines

Reference.Reference_Standard: VINORELBINE FOR PEAK IDENTIFICATION A CRS
VINORELBINE FOR PEAK IDENTIFICATION B CRS
WHITE MULBERRY LEAF FOR SYSTEM SUITABILITY HRS
WILD PANSY FOR SYSTEM SUITABILITY HRS
ZIDOVUDINE FOR SYSTEM SUITABILITY A CRS
ZOLPIDEM FOR SYSTEM SUITABILITY CRS - * PSY (ZOLPIDEM TARTRATE)
Reference.Information: We require your original import permit to apply for an export licence from the French authorities (allow 2-3 weeks). Your permit must be valid for at least 3 months. Please indicate your preferred airport You should apply for your import permit, per vial, 9,982 mg of zolpidem tartrate (=8mg zolpidem).

We require your original import permit to proceed with the shipment (allow 2-3 weeks). For your import permit, you have to apply for 200 mg of Zolpidem tartrate (160 mg of Zolpidem, anhydrous), PER VIAL. Your import permit must be valid for at least 3 months. Please specify your preferred airport for parcel pickup in your next communication.

We require your original import permit to proceed with the shipment (allow 2-3 weeks). For your import permit, you have to apply for 40 mg of Zopiclone, PER VIAL. Your import permit must be valid for at least 3 months. Please specify your preferred airport for parcel pickup in your next communication.
